{# !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! ! THIS TEMPLATE IS SHARED ACROSS ALL TESSERACT ECOSYSTEM REPOS. ! ! Any changes here MUST be copied to: ! ! - tesseract-jax/docs/_templates/page.html ! ! - tesseract-streamlit/docs/_templates/page.html ! !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Override Furo's page template to add a persistent top navigation bar and support custom body classes from page metadata. In tesseract-core the internal links use pathto(); in other repos they fall back to absolute URLs on the live deployment. #} {% extends "!page.html" %} {# Base URL for tesseract-core docs (used when building other repos) #} {% set core_base = "https://docs.pasteurlabs.ai/projects/tesseract-core/latest/" %} {% set is_core = (project == "Tesseract Core") %} {% block body %}

{% if meta and meta.get("html_class") %} {% endif %} {{ super() }} {% endblock %}
